dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dark Cloud Cover pattern: Entry conditions check for uptrend continuation (close > sma_50), tall white candle (prev_close > prev_open), black candle opening above prior high (open > prev_high), and closing below the midpoint of prior day's body (close < pivot, which approximates the midpoint). Exit when price closes above the prior high, signaling pattern failure. Pattern typically holds 3-5 days.

backtest_rule.reason: Dark Cloud Cover pattern: Entry conditions check for uptrend continuation (close > sma_50), tall white candle (prev_close > prev_open), black candle opening above prior high (open > prev_high), and closing below the midpoint of prior day's body (close < pivot, which approximates the midpoint). Exit when price closes above the prior high, signaling pattern failure. Pattern typically holds 3-5 days.

source_rule_text: Dark Cloud Cover: A reversal pattern occurring after an upward price trend, consisting of a tall white candle followed by a black candle that opens above the prior high and closes below the midpoint of the prior day's body.
